name: Webflow
description: Connect to Webflow to sync sites, CMS collections, items, and pages via the Webflow REST API v2.

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.description: OAuth2 Client ID from your Webflow App registration.

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.description: OAuth2 Client Secret from your Webflow App registration.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.description: OAuth2 callback URL registered with your Webflow App. Must match exactly.
